description: Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 ('admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!') and configure a scheduled alert named 'Web_Error_Spike' to mitigate alert fatigue. The alert must query the 'web_logs' index to detect high volumes of web errors grouped by client IP address, scheduled to run every 5 minutes (*/5 * * * *). Implement alert throttling to suppress subsequent alerts for the same client IP address for exactly 1 hour after the alert fires.
